Thaw frozen ikura out one day in advance in cooler
Rinse ikura in a smaller, fine bowl strainer (similar to the rice strainers).
Rinse until the broken egg skins float to the top of the water, discard broken skins (gently stir to allow movement)
After broken skins are filtered out, strain ikura
In a bowl, add ikura and tosazu and marinate for ~20 minutes.
After marinade timing, strain tosazu and reserve ikura in pint containers.
